rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre avg £726 (~$915); outside centre £573 (~$720); ~$780 midrange

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; avg £243 (~$305) for 85m2; heating significant

diningOut.note: Old Town tourist premium; ~$283 avg dining

transit.note: monthly tram/bus pass; also SKM commuter rail

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; growing Tri-City tech scene

simData.note: Polish SIM; unlimited data plans cheap

misc.note: gym, toiletries, Baltic beach activities, entertainment, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Baltic coast city; summer tourist peak.

evidence.quote: The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £726, compared to £573 outside the centre
the cost of living in Gdansk is $1668 per month for digital nomads. A single person costs $1,859 per month
Monthly groceries cost $214, while dining out averages $283. Basic utilities in Gdańsk cost an average of £243 per month

evidence.claim: Gdańsk top city for expats; affordable while maintaining good infrastructure
evidence.quote: Gdańsk is positioned as one of the top cities in Europe for expats, digital nomads and entrepreneurs, offering affordable living costs while maintaining good infrastructure
